title: Back to the Future
author: Robert Zemeckis
snippet: Multi-generational wins are hard. This one wins. Grandma will follow the time-travel rules.
full_text:
Eighties teenager Marty McFly is accidentally sent back in time to 1955, inadvertently disrupting his parents' first meeting and attracting his mother's romantic interest. Marty must repair the damage to history by rekindling his parents' romance and - with the help of his eccentric inventor friend Doc Brown - return to 1985.

Watch on: fuboTV, MGM+ Amazon Channel, MGM Plus
tagline: He was never in time for his classes... He wasn't in time for his dinner... Then one day... he wasn't in his time at all.
watch_on: fuboTV, MGM+ Amazon Channel, MGM Plus

title: The Princess Bride
author: Rob Reiner
snippet: The household-name rewatchable. Quoted across the room within the first ten minutes.
full_text:
In this enchantingly cracked fairy tale, the beautiful Princess Buttercup and the dashing Westley must overcome staggering odds to find happiness amid six-fingered swordsmen, murderous princes, Sicilians and rodents of unusual size. But even death can't stop these true lovebirds from triumphing.

Watch on: Disney Plus, AMC, Philo
tagline: Heroes. Giants. Villains. Wizards. True Love.

title: Singin' in the Rain
author: Gene Kelly
snippet: Older relatives will be delighted. Younger ones will be surprised it's actually fun.
full_text:
In 1927 Hollywood, a silent film star falls for a chorus girl just as he and his paranoid screen partner struggle to make the difficult transition to talking pictures.

Watch on: HBO Max, HBO Max Amazon Channel, TCM
watch_on: HBO Max, HBO Max Amazon Channel, TCM

title: It's a Wonderful Life
author: Frank Capra
snippet: Holiday-coded but works any time. Strong on grandparents, surprisingly current on its core argument.
full_text:
George Bailey has spent his entire life giving to the people of Bedford Falls.  All that prevents rich skinflint Mr. Potter from taking over the entire town is George's modest building and loan company.  But on Christmas Eve the business's $8,000 is lost and George's troubles begin.

Watch on: Amazon Prime Video, Amazon Prime Video with Ads
tagline: It's a wonderful laugh! It's a wonderful love!
watch_on: Amazon Prime Video, Amazon Prime Video with Ads

title: The Sound of Music
author: Robert Wise
snippet: Long, but the songs do the work. Three-generation reliable pick.
full_text:
In the years before World War II, a tomboyish postulant at an Austrian abbey is hired as a governess in the home of a widowed naval captain with seven children and brings a new love of life and music into the home.

Watch on: Disney Plus
tagline: The happiest sound in all the world!

title: Cool Runnings
author: Jon Turteltaub
snippet: Underrated as the family-friendly sports comedy. Bobsled, John Candy, no objectionable content.
full_text:
When a Jamaican sprinter is disqualified from the Olympic Games, he enlists the help of a dishonored coach to start the first Jamaican bobsled team.

Watch on: Disney Plus
tagline: One dream. Four Jamaicans. Twenty below zero.

title: Forrest Gump
author: Robert Zemeckis
snippet: Aunts and uncles will quote it. The historical backdrop carries the older relatives.
full_text:
A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. But despite all he has achieved, his one true love eludes him.

Watch on: fuboTV, MGM+ Amazon Channel, Paramount Plus Premium
tagline: The world will never be the same once you've seen it through the eyes of Forrest Gump.
watch_on: fuboTV, MGM+ Amazon Channel, Paramount Plus Premium

title: The Sandlot
author: David Mickey Evans
snippet: Summer childhood compressed into 100 minutes. Plays for everyone over six.
full_text:
During a summer of friendship and adventure, one boy becomes a part of the gang, nine boys become a team and their leader becomes a legend by confronting the terrifying mystery beyond the right field wall.

Watch on: Amazon Prime Video, Disney Plus, Amazon Prime Video with Ads
tagline: They're more than a team. They're the best buddies in the entire history of the world.
watch_on: Amazon Prime Video, Disney Plus, Amazon Prime Video with Ads

title: Big
author: Penny Marshall
snippet: The Tom Hanks one where he's a kid in an adult body. The piano scene still works on a phone.
full_text:
When a young boy makes a wish at a carnival machine to be big—he wakes up the following morning to find that it has been granted and his body has grown older overnight. But he is still the same 13-year-old boy inside. Now he must learn how to cope with the unfamiliar world of grown-ups including getting a job and having his first romantic encounter with a woman.

Watch on: Disney Plus
tagline: Have you ever had a really big secret?

title: Toy Story 3
author: Lee Unkrich
snippet: Doubles as a toy story for the kids and a college-departure story for the parents. Universal cry.
full_text:
Woody, Buzz, and the rest of Andy's toys haven't been played with in years. With Andy about to go to college, the gang find themselves accidentally left at a nefarious day care center. The toys must band together to escape and return home to Andy.

Watch on: Disney Plus
